items.name: Classy Vintage Raised Glasses on Head – Gold Pink
items.description:
Classy Vintage Raised Glasses on Head – Gold Pink CC Y2K McBling
Timeless and effortlessly chic, these Classy Vintage Raised Glasses bring a touch of old-school glamour to any look. With their sleek black frame and subtly elevated shape, they strike the perfect balance between elegance and attitude. Whether worn on your face or perched stylishly on your head, they’re the ultimate accessory for channeling that confident, vintage-inspired aesthetic.
